steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage establishes a chain: water evaporates from the crust → voids form → oil fills the voids → fat content rises. The question asks what follows logically if less moisture is lost during frying.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'less fat is absorbed': less moisture lost means fewer voids, which means less oil absorbed — directly follows the passage's mechanism. ✓
  • Choice B — 'temperature affects fat absorption': temperature is not part of the passage's moisture-void-fat chain. ✗
  • Choice C — 'crust permeability increases': misapplies the mechanism; permeability isn't discussed as a factor. ✗
  • Choice D — 'crispiness decreases': reverses the expected outcome and introduces an unsupported link. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
